case_title: ROSEN, JEFFREY A. VS JAPAN AIR LINES AKA JAPAN AIR LINES COMPANY LTD.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY ROSEN, JEFFREY A. AS TO DEFENDANT JAPAN AIR LINES AKA JAPAN AIR LINES COMPANY LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL TO WAYNE KURAMOTO, AUTHORIZED AGENT RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSEN, JEFFREY A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAPAN AIR LINES AKA JAPAN AIR LINES COMPANY LTD. DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE ON MOTION BY PLTF IN OPEN COURT. NO OBJECTION BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
